title: 22cm Large Glitter Poinsettia 4 Pcs Artificial Velvet Magnolia Christmas Flowers Picks Floral Ornaments for Xmas Tree Decorations Wreaths Garland Holiday New Year Party Wedding Decor (Burgundy)
features: 【Festive Glamour】 – Bring holiday magic with these 22cm glitter Poinsettias & velvet Magnolia Christmas flowers! Perfect for tree decor, wreaths, or centerpieces—4 lush stems for dazzling Xmas, weddings & New Year parties.

【Luxury Poinsettia Christmas Decor】 – Large, shimmering artificial flowers with flexible wire stems. Mix with greenery for a lavish tree or garland. Fade-proof & reusable—no wilting, just year-round elegance!
【Easy Holiday Styling】 – Bend, fluff & arrange! These Christmas tree flowers instantly upgrade your christmas tree, mantels, gifts, or party backdrops. A must-have for DIY lovers & decorators.
【Perfect Gift Idea】 – Surprise a decor enthusiast! These high-quality Poinsettia & Magnolia floral picks make festive decorating effortless.
【Realistic & Long-Lasting】 – Ultra-soft velvet petals & glitter accents mimic fresh blooms. No maintenance—just stunning Christmas cheer season after season!
description: Transform your holiday décor with these stunning 22-centimetre glitter poinsettia picks. Each set includes four exquisite artificial flowers crafted from luxurious velvet material, featuring a magnificent magnolia-inspired design with a festive sparkle. The deep, rich colours and delicate glitter details make these floral ornaments perfect for adding a touch of elegance to your Christmas tree, holiday arrangements, or special events. These versatile decorative picks can beautifully enhance your New Year celebrations, winter weddings, or any festive gathering. The generous size and thoughtful construction ensure these flowers make a striking visual impact wherever they're placed. Whether artfully arranged on your Christmas tree, incorporated into a holiday centrepiece, or used to embellish gift wrapping, these artificial poinsettias bring a magical touch to your seasonal decorating.
